title: lib/join
description: The lib/join directory contains classes that implement join operations on data sources. The InnerJoinRecordReader class performs a full inner join, while the OuterJoinRecordReader class performs a full outer join. These classes collaborate to combine tuples from multiple data sources based on a common key. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a flexible and efficient way to perform join operations in a distributed computing environment.

DESCRIPTION:
The lib/join directory contains classes that implement join operations on data sources. The InnerJoinRecordReader class performs a full inner join, while the OuterJoinRecordReader class performs a full outer join. These classes collaborate to combine tuples from multiple data sources based on a common key. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a flexible and efficient way to perform join operations in a distributed computing environment.
